about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: SOC Analyst | Salesforce QA Consultant at PwC India | Full Stack Developer | Mumbai, India
about.description: I am a cybersecurity professional transitioning into SOC Analyst and DFIR roles, with hands-on experience investigating real-world malware infections, detecting credential theft, and writing Splunk detection rules. Google Cybersecurity Certified, ISC2 Certified in Cybersecurity, and currently pursuing BTL1.
about.description2: As a Full Stack Developer with MERN Stack and Salesforce experience, I bring a unique perspective — I understand how systems are built and how they are attacked. This dual background makes me effective in Application Security, DevSecOps, and blue team environments.
about.description3: Currently building my cybersecurity portfolio through daily hands-on lab work: analyzing real malware PCAPs, mapping attacker behavior to MITRE ATT&CK, and writing detection rules that would catch these threats in a production SIEM.
